name: HelloSign (Dropbox Sign)
description: HelloSign (now Dropbox Sign) is an electronic signature platform. Use this API to send documents for signing, track signature request status, download completed signed PDFs, manage reusable signing templates, and handle embedded signing workflows.

capabilities.name: account_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the currently authenticated account details including quotas and callback URL.

capabilities.name: account_update
capabilities.description: Update the authenticated account callback URL and locale settings.

capabilities.name: account_create
capabilities.description: Create a new Dropbox Sign account that must be confirmed via email.

capabilities.name: account_verify
capabilities.description: Verify whether a Dropbox Sign account exists for a given email.

capabilities.name: signature_request_send
capabilities.description: Send a new signature request to one or more signers with file uploads and form fields.

capabilities.name: signature_request_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the status and details of a specific signature request.

capabilities.name: signature_request_list
capabilities.description: List all signature requests with pagination and search filtering.

capabilities.name: signature_request_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel an incomplete signature request.

capabilities.name: signature_request_remind
capabilities.description: Send a reminder email to a signer who has not yet signed.

capabilities.name: signature_request_files
capabilities.description: Download files associated with a signature request as PDF or ZIP.

capabilities.name: signature_request_send_with_template
capabilities.description: Send a signature request using a pre-configured template with signer roles.

capabilities.name: signature_request_bulk_send_with_template
capabilities.description: Bulk send signature requests to multiple signer sets using a template.

capabilities.name: signature_request_create_embedded
capabilities.description: Create an embedded signature request for in-app signing via iFrame.

capabilities.name: signature_request_create_embedded_with_template
capabilities.description: Create an embedded signature request using a template for in-app signing.

capabilities.name: template_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific template including signer roles and fields.

capabilities.name: template_list
capabilities.description: List all templates available to your account.

capabilities.name: template_create
capabilities.description: Create a new reusable signing template with signer roles and form fields.

capabilities.name: template_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a template.

capabilities.name: template_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing template name, subject, or message.

capabilities.name: template_add_user
capabilities.description: Give another account access to use a template.

capabilities.name: template_remove_user
capabilities.description: Remove another account's access from a template.

capabilities.name: team_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve information about your team including name and members.

capabilities.name: team_create
capabilities.description: Create a new team for your Dropbox Sign account.

capabilities.name: team_update
capabilities.description: Update your team name.

capabilities.name: team_add_member
capabilities.description: Invite a user to join your team.

capabilities.name: team_remove_member
capabilities.description: Remove a member from your team.

capabilities.name: bulk_send_job_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the status and details of a bulk send job.

capabilities.name: bulk_send_job_list
capabilities.description: List all bulk send jobs for your account.

capabilities.name: embedded_sign_url
capabilities.description: Retrieve the sign URL for an embedded signature to display in an iFrame.

capabilities.name: embedded_edit_url
capabilities.description: Retrieve the edit URL for an embedded template draft to display in an iFrame.

capabilities.name: unclaimed_draft_create
capabilities.description: Create an unclaimed draft that can be claimed by another user to send a signature request.

capabilities.name: api_app_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific API app by client ID.

capabilities.name: api_app_list
capabilities.description: List all API apps associated with your account.

capabilities.name: api_app_create
capabilities.description: Create a new API app for embedded signing workflows.

capabilities.name: api_app_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing API app settings.

capabilities.name: api_app_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an API app by its client ID.

capabilities.name: report_create
capabilities.description: Generate a report of signature requests and/or templates within a date range.
